tool_snippets.snippet:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS measurement_count
FROM ligandmetal_stability_measured s
JOIN ligandmetal_card c ON s.card_id = c.card_id
WHERE c.metal_id = 208;

paragraphs.text:
Chemistry insight
- Zn2+ data are concentrated near ambient conditions in water: most measurements at 25 °C and ionic strength ~0.1 mol L⁻¹. 
- Ligand coverage emphasizes biologically relevant donors (histidine, cysteine, imidazole) and classic chelators (ethylenediamine, phosphonates), reflecting Zn2+’s strong affinity for N/O/S donor sets.

claims.text: Zn2+ data are concentrated near ambient conditions in water:
most measurements at 25 °C and ionic strength ~0.1 mol L⁻¹.
Ligand coverage emphasizes biologically relevant donors (histidine, cysteine, imidazole) and classic chelators (ethylenediamine, phosphonates)
reflecting Zn2+’s strong affinity for N/O/S donor sets.
